title: cleisostoma odoratum subsp. odoratum
intro: Cleisostoma odoratum subsp. odoratum is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Cleisostoma odoratum subsp. odoratum is traditionally prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink.
